raw_consumer_statement: While traveling in XXXX my credit card was charged {$1400.00} and {$1400.00} from a gas station pump attendant. The charges said they were in XXXX XXXX even though we were in the XXXX area. We immediately declined the charges once American Express contacted us with a fraud protection alert. American Express proceeded to decline one charge and approve the other. We have worked with both the fraud department and unauthorized charge department with no success. The charge of {$1400.00} is still on our account and American Express keeps closing any new file we open after a few weeks of investigating.
